Liu Xie еҠүеҒ•
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Xie (еҠүеҒ•)was born in Langye. Failed to get supplies from local tribe so advised a quick attack on them. Liu Xie was affiliated with Liu Xun.
